query:
CREATE TABLE `tiab_customers` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`tiabCustomerId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`companyName` varchar(512),
	`firstName` varchar(256),
	`lastName` varchar(256),
	`email` varchar(320),
	`phone` varchar(64),
	`mobile` varchar(64),
	`abn` varchar(32),
	`address` varchar(512),
	`suburb` varchar(128),
	`state` varchar(16),
	`postcode` varchar(16),
	`status` varchar(32),
	`internalCustomerExternalId` varchar(32),
	`matchConfidence` decimal(4,2),
	`matchType` varchar(64),
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_customers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_customers_tiabCustomerId_unique` UNIQUE(`tiabCustomerId`)
);
CREATE TABLE `tiab_data_pools` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`tiabPoolId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`tiabCustomerId` varchar(64),
	`poolName` varchar(256),
	`totalCapacityGb` decimal(10,3),
	`usedGb` decimal(10,3),
	`remainingGb` decimal(10,3),
	`memberCount` int,
	`membersJson` text,
	`snapshotDate` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_data_pools_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `tiab_plans` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`tiabPlanId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`planName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`planType` varchar(64),
	`description` text,
	`baseCharge` decimal(10,4),
	`dataAllowanceGb` decimal(10,3),
	`voiceAllowanceMinutes` int,
	`smsAllowance` int,
	`contractTermMonths` int,
	`status` varchar(32),
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_plans_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_plans_tiabPlanId_unique` UNIQUE(`tiabPlanId`)
);
CREATE TABLE `tiab_recon_issues` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`tiabServiceId` varchar(64),
	`tiabCustomerId` varchar(64),
	`internalServiceExternalId` varchar(32),
	`internalCustomerExternalId` varchar(32),
	`billingPeriod` varchar(16),
	`issueType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`severity` varchar(16) DEFAULT 'medium',
	`description` text,
	`expectedValue` varchar(256),
	`actualValue` varchar(256),
	`varianceAmount` decimal(12,4),
	`status` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'open',
	`resolutionNotes` text,
	`resolvedAt` timestamp,
	`resolvedBy` varchar(256),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_recon_issues_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `tiab_services` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`tiabServiceId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`tiabCustomerId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`planId` varchar(64),
	`planName` varchar(256),
	`status` varchar(32),
	`serviceType` varchar(64),
	`msisdn` varchar(32),
	`simSerial` varchar(64),
	`imei` varchar(32),
	`activationDate` varchar(32),
	`suspensionDate` varchar(32),
	`cessationDate` varchar(32),
	`dataPoolId` varchar(64),
	`internalServiceExternalId` varchar(32),
	`reconStatus` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'pending',
	`reconNotes` text,
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_services_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_services_tiabServiceId_unique` UNIQUE(`tiabServiceId`)
);
CREATE TABLE `tiab_sync_log` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`syncType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running',
	`recordsFetched` int DEFAULT 0,
	`recordsCreated` int DEFAULT 0,
	`recordsUpdated` int DEFAULT 0,
	`recordsErrored` int DEFAULT 0,
	`errorMessage` text,
	`startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`completedAt` timestamp,
	`durationMs` int,
	`triggeredBy` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'system',
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_sync_log_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `tiab_transactions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`tiabTransactionId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`tiabCustomerId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`tiabServiceId` varchar(64),
	`transactionType` varchar(64),
	`amount` decimal(12,4),
	`gst` decimal(12,4),
	`description` text,
	`transactionDate` varchar(32),
	`billingPeriodStart` varchar(32),
	`billingPeriodEnd` varchar(32),
	`status` varchar(32),
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_transactions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `tiab_transactions_tiabTransactionId_unique` UNIQUE(`tiabTransactionId`)
)

CREATE TABLE `tiab_services` (
